Class BatchEventAutoConfiguration

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener.BatchEventAutoConfiguration
@AutoConfiguration(after=SimpleTaskAutoConfiguration.class) @ConditionalOnClass(org.springframework.batch.core.job.Job.class) @ConditionalOnBean({org.springframework.batch.core.job.Job.class,TaskLifecycleListener.class}) @ConditionalOnProperty(prefix="spring.cloud.task.batch.events", name="enabled", havingValue="true", matchIfMissing=true) public class BatchEventAutoConfiguration extends Object
Autoconfigures Spring Batch listeners designed to emit events on the following channels.
  • EventEmittingJobExecutionListener - job-execution-events
  • EventEmittingStepExecutionListener - step-execution-events
  • ChunkListener - chunk-events
  • EventEmittingItemReadListener - item-read-events
  • EventEmittingItemProcessListener - item-process-events
  • EventEmittingItemWriteListener - item-write-events
  • EventEmittingSkipListener - skip-events
Author:
Michael Minella, Glenn Renfro, Ali Shahbour
